schedule.closedDayHint: The establishment is closed on this day of the week.
schedule.noSlotsHint: No times available for this date.
schedule.staffOwnAgendaNotice: You are booking on your own agenda as a professional at this location. Times follow the same availability rules as the app and do not overlap with other already reserved appointments.

confirm.title: Appointment summary
confirm.intro: Records the appointment on the location's agenda. The customer needs an app account with the e-mail below.
confirm.errorChooseProfessional: Choose a specific professional before confirming.
confirm.errorInvalidEmail: Enter a valid e-mail — it must match the customer's app account.
confirm.errorMissingEmail: Enter the e-mail of the customer's app account (the same one used in Profile).
confirm.errorBookingFailed: Could not complete the booking. Please try again.
confirm.dialogConfirmMessage: The time is confirmed for the account with the e-mail provided and appears on your agenda as a professional.
confirm.dialogSuccessMessage: The customer will see the time in the Appointments area. The new appointment appears right away on the location's calendar.

serviceSelect.headerHint: Choose the service for this appointment. On confirmation, enter the e-mail of the customer's app account.
